owner_info.additional_context: Wife Sarah handles office admin part-time. Looking to professionalise the business so it runs without me on the tools. Key focus is building a management layer (Ops Manager + Sales Manager) so I can work ON the business.

owner_info.love_doing: The mix of Operations, Finance, and Strategic Planning
owner_info.additional_context:
We are a established but small, owner-operated business with limited human resources. Jason manages all technical work, production, and installations, while I manage operations, customer service, finance, sales, and marketing. This means efficiency, clarity, and prioritisation are essential for us.

We are focused on growing espressoDECK and increasing recurring revenue through coffee beans and service work, but we must navigate this within the constraints of time, cash flow, and a small workspace. Any strategies that help streamline systems, automate early-stage enquiries, or reduce manual workload will make a meaningful difference.

We value practical, simple solutions that support sustainable growth, protect cash flow, and help us scale without compromising our customer experience.

top_challenges:
Managing Increasing Lead Volume Without Overextending Resources
Your marketing is working and enquiries are flowing in, but many are early-stage. Responding, quoting, and educating each lead takes time. Without better qualification systems or automation, the workload becomes unmanageable for a small team.

Limited Human Resources, Lack of Space and Cash Flow Constraints
Your business is currently run by two people with some casual help. Technical work, admin, production, freight, sales, and customer support compete for the same limited capacity. Cash flow is impacted by production costs and long sales cycles. Space constraints in the workshop slow down manufacturing, and storage, adding to operational pressure.

Scaling espressoDECK Production
Demand is growing locally and internationally. To scale, you need stronger documentation, streamlined assembly processes, more structured resources, and eventually compliance steps such as CE certification. Lack of time, staffing and workspace makes it hard to reach the next stage of production efficiency.
growth_opportunities: Expand espressoDECK Wholesale and Reseller Partnerships (Australia and Overseas)
Increase Recurring Revenue Through Coffee Bean Sales and Service Programs
Streamline and Scale espressoDECK Production Through Documentation and Process Improvements

top_challenges: Lack of offshore teams
Sales
Staff - Jess is the smartest everyone else is entry level
growth_opportunities: Expanding services to include advisory (cashflow and budgeting)

owner_info.additional_context: I am totally burned out and do not believe I have the right skill set to drive success in the business anymore.

top_challenges: Company has attempted to scale twice and retreated due to company finacial viability (1st attempt) financial viability and staff moral (2nd attempt)
Company needs new leadership that can mantain financial viability & team stability
We have lost client loyality and are not living up to our brand promise. We are now needing to invest significantly in sales pipeline instead of relying on repeat business and raving fans.
growth_opportunities: Wining large contracts and government tenders
Taking on more markert share as other ESD firms downsize
M&A with other NatHERS Assessors around the country
locations: Collaroy Office - Services Nationally but heavily NSW focused

owner_info.love_doing: Training staff, improving workflows, handling client communication
